name: Qualified Overtime Compensation Deduction

eligibility.description: Available to individuals receiving FLSA overtime pay. Limited to $12,500 ($25,000 joint). Phases out starting at $150,000 MAGI ($300,000 joint). Requires a valid SSN and joint return if married.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a deduction for qualified overtime pay received under the Fair Labor Standards Act, effectively making a portion of overtime pay tax-free.
